mapper.select: SELECT t1. uid , t1.refresh_token as token , t1.del_yn , t1.expiration_period , t1.ip , t2.user_id FROM esg.tb_user_token t1 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_user_info t2 ON t1.uid = t2.uuid order by t1.expiration_period desc, t1.del_yn desc

SELECT t1. uid , t1.api_token as token , t1.api_token_nm as token_nm , t1.del_yn , t1.expiration_period , t1.created_at , t2.user_id FROM esg.tb_user_token_api t1 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_user_info t2 ON t1.uid = t2.uuid order by t1.api_seq desc, t1.del_yn desc
mapper.insert:
delete from esg.tb_user_token_api t1 where t1.uid = #{uid};
INSERT INTO esg.tb_user_token_api ( uid, created_at, created_by, api_token, api_token_nm, del_yn, expiration_period ) VALUES ( #{uid}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{token}, #{tokenNm}, #{delYn}, #{expirationPeriod} );
mapper.select: SELECT count(t1.*) FROM esg.tb_user_token_api t1 WHERE t1.api_token = #{apiToken} AND t1.del_yn = 'N'
